comment_terminate_distance: Robot will terminate if anything is within 0.4 meters (40cm, 400mm) from robot - includes non-stationary entities
comment_slow_distance_moving_entity: Robot motion will slow when a moving entity is within 2 meters of the robot
comment_terminate_distance_moving_entity: Terminate when a moving entity enters within 1m of the robot
dev_note: These distance are 'magic' numbers, please replace with calaculated distances according to ISO Standards
dev_note_2: terminate_distance is set to 0.4, as the robot plans to stop at 0.5m to the nearest wall (typically adjacent to target wall)
